    <item>
        <guid>nba530317</guid>
        <title>Donovan Mitchell: Posts 22 points in Game 7 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/donovan-mitchell-4166</link>
        <description>Mitchell produced 22 points (9-20 FG, 2-9 3Pt, 2-2 FT), three rebounds and one assist across 35 minutes during Sunday's 114-102 win over the Raptors in Game 7 of the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 03 May 2026 8:23:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530309</guid>
        <title>Jarrett Allen: Massive double-double in Game 7 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jarrett-allen-4122</link>
        <description>Allen amassed 22 points (7-11 FG, 8-14 FT), 19 rebounds, three blocks, two assists and two steals across 33 minutes in Sunday's 114-102 Game 7 win over the Raptors in the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 03 May 2026 7:57:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530305</guid>
        <title>Scottie Barnes: Paces Toronto in season-ending loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/scottie-barnes-5390</link>
        <description>Barnes posted 24 points (8-14 FG, 1-1 3Pt, 7-7 FT), nine rebounds, six assists and one block across 37 minutes in Sunday's 114-102 Game 7 loss to the Cavaliers in the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 03 May 2026 7:49:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530301</guid>
        <title>Cade Cunningham: Leads Detroit to next round</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/cade-cunningham-5336</link>
        <description>Cunningham finished with 32 points (10-18 FG, 4-6 3Pt, 8-10 FT), one rebound, 12 assists and two blocks across 39 minutes in Sunday's 116-94 win over Orlando in Game 7 of the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 03 May 2026 3:29:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530300</guid>
        <title>Paolo Banchero: Erupts for 38 points in Game 7 loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/paolo-banchero-5700</link>
        <description>Banchero supplied 38 points (14-25 FG, 4-7 3Pt, 6-8 FT), nine rebounds, six assists and one block across 42 minutes in Sunday's 116-94 Game 7 loss to the Pistons in the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 03 May 2026 3:25:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
